mapper.insert:
insert into sky_take_out.order_detail (name, image, order_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, dish_flavor, amount) values
(#{item.name}, #{item.image}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.dishId}, #{item.setmealId}, #{item.dishFlavor}, #{item.amount})
mapper.select:
select * from sky_take_out.order_detail where order_id in
#{orderId}
